title: Optional Manifest Properties
description: Standardized optional properties that projects may include in manifest.json.

command-name.description: CLI binary name for projects that ship an executable.

naming.description: Human-readable names for semver tiers, used in changelogs and release notes.

major.description: Name for the current major version era.

minor.description: Name for the current minor version focus.

patch.description: Name for the current patch version focus.
